content.text: Claude can read and work with file uploads, including PDFs, Word documents, and text files.
: Upload a long report or paper and ask for a summary, key takeaways, or an executive brief.
: Ask specific questions like “What is the budget mentioned in this PDF?” or “List all risks in this document.”
: You can upload multiple documents and ask Claude to compare them or find differences.
: Rather than just skimming, Claude can read through sections, understand context, and answer complex questions that require understanding the whole document.
: For engineers, this is useful for reading technical specs, architecture docs, API docs, or research papers.
, this capability is enhanced: you can keep a set of documents and context together across many conversations, so Claude remembers the material without you re-uploading it.
